## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `cd web && npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org) (lowercase, concise)
- [ ] If this changes the schema, I added a numbered migration in `internal/store/migrations/`
- [ ] If this touches auth, sessions, SQL construction, or multi-tenant isolation, I flagged the reviewer in the description
